note: language-neutral: decode base64url → bytes → checkAuthorityProofBytes(package, config); assert result and (for a negative) that reason contains code.

vectors.note: quorum basis in aeq; support carries no quorum
duplicate JSON keys collapse on parse, fail round-trip
a JSON array is not a { term, witnesses } package
a coordinate param on QuorumAgreement (must derive from πChain)
two intervals on different clocks cannot be ordered
votes for a foreign domain are not counted
attacker witnesses not admitted by config
a tampered witness fails its content address
witness pubs swapped at the same key_ids: quorum breaks + config_id changes
